mapper.select: WITH filtered AS ( SELECT ts, value_number FROM device_telemetry WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} AND property = #{property} AND value_number IS NOT NULL AND ts >= #{startTime} AND ts <= #{endTime} ), latest AS ( SELECT value_number FROM filtered ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT COUNT(1) AS sampleCount, AVG(value_number) AS avgValue, MAX(value_number) AS maxValue, MIN(value_number) AS minValue, SUM(value_number) AS sumValue, (SELECT value_number FROM latest) AS latestValue FROM filtered
